data.title: Sports nutrition market to hit USD 53.42 billion by 2031 with 8.18% CAGR, starting from USD 36.06 billion in 2026.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of January 12, 2026, the sports nutrition market has been assessed by Mordor Intelligence to be valued at USD 36.06 billion. Projections indicate that it is set to increase to USD 53.42 billion by 2031, displaying a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.18%. This growth trend highlights the continuous expansion of the market as more people adopt active lifestyles.

data.title: Aclaris starts Phase 1b trial for Atopic Dermatitis with ATI-052, a novel bispecific antibody.
data.description: Aclaris has started a Phase 1b trial to assess the efficacy of its novel Bispecific Antibody ATI-052 in Atopic Dermatitis (AD). This trial aims to test the potential of the drug in treating AD. The company is conducting this proof-of-concept trial to gather data on the drug's performance and safety profile. This marks a significant step forward in Aclaris' research and development efforts, with hopes high for the success of ATI-052 in managing AD. The Phase 1b trial will involve a specific number of participants and will provide crucial insights into the drug's effectiveness.

data.title: NuScale Power study in Oregon shows its technology supports profitable, reliable power for chemical plants.
data.description: In Corvallis, Oregon, NuScale Power unveiled findings from a study indicating that their technology can provide dependable and profitable power for chemical plants. The study highlights the viability of NuScale's technology in supporting the energy needs of chemical plants.

data.title: DAHON and IDEAL Bike partner for green mobility. DAHON TECH (Stock Code: 02543.HK) & Ideal Bike Corp (Stock Code: 8933) collaborate.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 12, 2026, DAHON TECH (HKEX Stock Code: 02543.HK), a top folding bicycle manufacturer, and Ideal Bike Corp (TPEx Stock Code: 8933) marked a significant collaboration. The two companies signed a strategic cooperation agreement at DAHON's headquarters, demonstrating a pivotal moment in their partnership.

data.title: Synthetic Feed Additives Market projected to reach $44.46 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 5.6%.
data.description: In January 12, 2026, a report from MarketsandMarkets™ revealed that the Synthetic Feed Additives Market is expected to increase from USD 33.88 billion in 2025 to USD 44.46 billion by 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.6% over the forecast period.

data.title: US Foods affirms FY2025 guidance with 4-5% sales growth, 10-12% EBITDA growth, 24-26% EPS growth. Attending ICR Conference.
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp. (NYSE: USFD) confirmed its fiscal year 2025 guidance during the 28th Annual ICR Conference. The company reiterates its projections for the fiscal year, as initially stated on Nov. 6, 2025. The outlook for Fiscal Year 2025 includes: a Net Sales growth of 4% to 5%, Adjusted EBITDA growth of 10% to 12%, and Adjusted Diluted EPS growth of 24% to 26%. US Foods remains committed to these targets as communicated during the conference.

data.title: J.Jill, Inc. raised Q4 fiscal 2025 guidance before the ICR Conference citing strong holiday season finish. CEO confident in strategic initiatives.
data.description: J.Jill, Inc., based in Quincy, Massachusetts, announced an increase in its fourth quarter fiscal 2025 guidance. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as JILL, adjusted their forecast prior to the 28th Annual ICR Conference, where CEO and President Mary Ellen Coyne made the statement. Expressing satisfaction with a robust end to the holiday period, Coyne highlighted a positive shift in performance, prompting the revised outlook. The company plans to maintain momentum by concentrating on strategic actions aimed at realizing upcoming opportunities.

data.title: Citi Trends reports 2025 holiday sales: $191.2M total, 9.6% increase from 2024; comp store sales up 9.3%.
data.description: Savannah-headquartered Citi Trends, Inc. (NASDAQ: CTRN), a prominent off-price retailer specializing in apparel, accessories, and home trends for African American households in the U.S., disclosed their holiday sales performance. During the nine-week holiday period concluding on January 3, 2026, the company recorded total sales amounting to $191.2 million. This signifies a noteworthy rise from $174.4 million generated during the same period in 2024, marking a substantial increase of 9.6%. Moreover, comparable store sales surged by 9.3% compared to the previous year, while achieving a two-year stack of 16.

data.title: OneSpaWorld announces preliminary Q4 and FY 2025 revenue & Adjusted EBITDA, introduces FY 2026 guidance.
data.description: OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited, a leading provider of health and wellness services in cruise ships and resorts globally, has announced preliminary revenue and Adjusted EBITDA projections for Fiscal Year 2025. The company, traded on NASDAQ as OSW, is also offering insights into Fiscal Year 2026 performance prior to its participation in the ICR Conference 2026. This update includes key financial figures and expectations for future growth.

data.title: Pharvaris (PHVS) outlines strategic priorities for 2026 to help those with bradykinin-mediated diseases like HAE, AAE-C1INH.
data.description: Located in ZUG, Switzerland, on Jan. 12, 2026, Pharvaris, listed on Nasdaq as PHVS, is a biopharmaceutical company in the late stages of development. They focus on creating innovative oral bradykinin B2 receptor antagonists aimed at assisting individuals affected by bradykinin-related conditions like hereditary angioedema (HAE) and acquired angioedema due to C1 inhibitor deficiency (AAE-C1INH). Recently, Pharvaris disclosed its key objectives for 2026.

data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals reports significant growth in 2025, releases 2026 financial guidance, and outlines strategic priorities. CEO to discuss at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANIP) revealed their initial financial figures for the full year 2025 and offered financial projections for 2026. Nikhil Lalwani, the President and CEO of ANI, will delve into these details during a speech at the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 13, 2026, at 3:00 p.m. PT/6:00 p.m. ET. This presentation will also cover the Company's strategic objectives for sustained expansion.

data.title: Spire Global launches 9 satellites on SpaceX's Twilight Mission from Vandenberg Space Force Base.
data.description: A Virginia-based company, Spire Global, Inc. (NYSE: SPIR), known for its satellite data services, recently deployed nine satellites through SpaceX's Twilight Mission from Vandenberg Space Force Base. The company aims to enhance global weather forecasting utilizing cutting-edge Hyperspectral Microwave Sounder (HyMS) technology aboard their latest satellite. Through this launch, Spire is expanding its capabilities in data analytics and intelligence services.

data.title: Booz Allen partners with Andreessen Horowitz to boost technology for governments, aiming to enhance America's technical capabilities.
data.description: Booz Allen (NYSE: BAH) of McLean, Virginia has unveiled a new partnership with Andreessen Horowitz to enhance America’s technological leadership.

data.title: DPM Metals hit gold production targets for the eleventh straight year; to reveal financials for Q4 and FY 2025 soon.
data.description: In Toronto on January 12, 2026, DPM Metals Inc. shared initial production figures for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company is listed on TSX as DPM and ASX as DPM, with ARBN 689370894.

data.title: Brookfield Corp (NYSE: BN, TSX: BN) to host Q4 2025 results conference call on Feb 12, 2026, at 10:00am (ET).
data.description: Brookfield Corporation is set to hold its Q4 2025 conference call and webcast on February 12, 2026, at 10:00 am (ET). The event is scheduled to take place on Thursday, with Brookfield Corporation being represented by their NYSE stock symbol BN and TSX stock symbol BN. Investors and stakeholders are invited to participate in the discussion about the company's performance during the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. to sell 2015 tanker for $57.5 million in Q1 or Q2 2026.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Scorpio Tankers Inc. (NYSE:STNG) revealed its plan to sell the scrubber-fitted LR2 product tanker, STI Kingsway, built in 2015. The selling price for this tanker is set at $57.5 million. The transaction is anticipated to be finalized in either the initial or second quarter of 2026.
